review_comment: LGTM - it might be helpful to have a comment here as to why this is needed (which IIRC, is because the Zephyr common libc `ctime_r()` implementation assumes UTC timezone, since timezone support is usually beyond the scope of most devices).

That's not completely accurate; newlib and picolibc both support timezones, but those depend on something actually setting the TZ environment variable within the runtime. CONFIG_NATIVE_LIBC is the right test because that's the only library which can inherit external system settings and find a non-UTC timezone.
Oh wow - I guess that's something I haven't considered in embedded for a while 😅
